title: Two New Amrit Bharat Express Trains Flagged Off Today: Check Routes, Stoppages, Timings and Start Dates
description: Indian Railways launched two new Amrit Bharat Express trains today, connecting Uttar Pradesh with Maharashtra. Check Banaras-Hadapsar Pune and Ayodhya Cantt-Mumbai LTT routes, stoppages, timings, coach details and commercial start dates.
